overview: A tourism promotion app for Mysore showcasing 12+ popular tourist attractions with preloaded data including entry fees, opening hours, nearby hotels, and detailed descriptions. Helps visitors explore and plan their trip to Mysore.
features: Browse 12+ Mysore tourist attractions with photos and details
Filter by attraction type (palace, temple, garden, zoo, etc.)
Search attractions by name in real time
Entry fee info with Indian and foreign visitor rates
Nearby hotel recommendations with price range and ratings
Responsive design for desktop, tablet, and mobile
